'''Bursthed''' was the [[Governor/Legends|Imperial Governor]] of [[Ruten]] during the [[New Republic era]]. He was known to be an evil and corrupt man but also an efficient bureaucrat. He considered his appointment as governor of Rutan beneath him and hoped that an effective term would lead to promotion.

==Biography==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Bursthed served as [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Draenell's Point]].<ref name="CTB" />

Bursthed's hobby was collecting exotic and unusual animals from all over the galaxy for his private menagerie. His collection included a [[bear spider]], a [[Dewback/Legends|dewback]], a [[Glittering Mynock|glittering mynock]], and a [[quexius]] bird from [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. His courtesans organized regular [[Ruten Pet Show|Pet Shows]] where the Governor would inevitably win first prize. In exchange for their support the judges of the shows would receive favors of land which were often taken from farmers later accused of [[Treason/Legends|treason]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and evicted. Also at these shows the animals were made to do tricks that often involve violence to [[Human/Legends|Humans]], more than often those accused of being Rebel leaders. Members of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] planned to stop these shows by arranging for the Governor to lose the contest. They planned to swap Bursthed's entry, a glittering mynock, for a [[Slug-rat/Legends|Slug-rat]]. Native to the planet Ruten, when woken the Slug-rat would attack the nearest person.
